sections.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + said (that) + subject + past tense verb (backshift tense one step back). Rules: Direct speech uses quotation marks; reported (indirect) speech reports what someone said without quotes | Present simple becomes past simple; present continuous becomes past continuous; present perfect becomes past perfect | Pronouns and time words often change (I -> he/she, today -> that day) | 'Said' is followed by an optional 'that'
sections.formula: Subject + said (that) + subject + past tense verb (backshift tense one step back)

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं थका हुआ हूँ।"
examples.english: He said, "I am tired."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
examples.english: He said that he was tired.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं स्कूल जाती हूँ।"
examples.english: She said, "I go to school."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह स्कूल जाती थी।
examples.english: She said that she went to school.

examples.hindi: उन्होंने कहा, "हम खुश हैं।"
examples.english: They said, "We are happy."

examples.hindi: उन्होंने कहा कि वे खुश थे।
examples.english: They said that they were happy.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + said (that) + subject + past tense verb (backshift tense one step back)

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैंने खाना खा लिया है।"
examples.english: He said, "I have eaten food."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि उसने खाना खा लिया था।
examples.english: He said that he had eaten food.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं यह कर रहा हूँ।"
examples.english: He said, "I am doing this."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह यह कर रहा था।
examples.english: He said that he was doing this.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मुझे यह पसंद है।"
examples.english: She said, "I like this."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि उसे यह पसंद था।
examples.english: She said that she liked this.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + said (that) + subject + past tense verb (backshift tense one step back)

examples.hindi: मैंने कहा, "मैं आऊँगा।"
examples.english: I said, "I will come."

examples.hindi: मैंने कहा कि मैं आऊँगा।
examples.english: I said that I would come.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "यह सच है।"
examples.english: He said, "This is true."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि यह सच था।
examples.english: He said that this was true.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Reported Speech Part 1 — Statements. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + said (that) + subject + past tense verb (backshift tense one step back)

examples.hindi: उन्होंने कहा, "हमें मदद चाहिए।"
examples.english: They said, "We need help."

examples.hindi: उन्होंने कहा कि उन्हें मदद चाहिए थी।
examples.english: They said that they needed help.

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "मैं यह समझता हूँ।"
examples.english: He said, "I understand this."

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह यह समझता था।
examples.english: He said that he understood this.
